Class GlacierTower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
tower.GlacierTower
public class GlacierTower extends Tower
An advanced fusion tower that combines superior range with cryogenic status effects. * The GlacierTower represents the pinnacle of long-range crowd control. By merging the properties of a Range Tower and an Ice Tower, it achieves a massive engagement radius, firing heavy IceBullet projectiles that damage and slow down enemies from a distance, effectively creating a "kill zone" across a large portion of the map.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class tower.Tower

    bulletDamage, bulletSpeed, cooldown, imagePath, name, placeSoundPath, range, stunned, stunTimer, timer, x, y

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GlacierTower(double x, double y)
    Constructs a GlacierTower with elite-tier statistics: - Range: 400 units (Extreme range) - Cooldown: 1.8 seconds (Slow fire rate, balanced by high impact) - Damage: 25 (High single-target damage)

  • Constructor Details

    • GlacierTower

      public GlacierTower(double x, double y)
      Constructs a GlacierTower with elite-tier statistics: - Range: 400 units (Extreme range) - Cooldown: 1.8 seconds (Slow fire rate, balanced by high impact) - Damage: 25 (High single-target damage)
      Parameters:
      x - Horizontal position on the game map.
      y - Vertical position on the game map.

  • Method Details

    • findTarget

      protected List<Enemy> findTarget(List<Enemy> enemies)
      Identifies the optimal target within its vast engagement radius. * Similar to the Range Tower's logic, this method removes type restrictions, allowing the tower to target any living enemy (including flying units). It prioritizes the "First" enemy—the one furthest along the navigational path.
      Overrides:
      findTarget in class Tower
      Parameters:
      enemies - List of all active enemies in the game.
      Returns:
      A list containing the single most advanced enemy within range.

    • shoot

      protected void shoot(Enemy target, List<Bullet> bullets)
      Fires a high-velocity IceBullet at the selected target. * Each shot deals significant damage and applies a powerful "Slow" debuff, leveraging the combined elemental strengths of its component towers.
      Specified by:
      shoot in class Tower
      Parameters:
      target - The enemy identified as the priority target.
      bullets - The global list of active projectiles.
